title: Facu's Resourcepack
description: A redesign of all the items in the game, but mantaining a vanilla aesthetic
body:
![All the food related items in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaf398b70608ca07692399c8c2397a453f3aa465.png)

This resourcepack aims to improve the look of every item texture in the game, while mantaining a vanilla aesthetic. The contents do not include blocks, gui, or entity textures, however gui changes are planned for future updates.

Feel free to add the resourcepack to any modpack without the need to counsult me. Feedback is welcomed.
